SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURRAY, LOU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAJDOUB, BEN ABDELHAMID SPECK CAB CO. INC. LEMOS, REJAYNE LEMOS, SERGIO SOARES $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $245.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,245.25, PLAINTIFF DISMISSES CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT - REJAYNE LEMOS AND DEFENDANT LEMOS, SERGIO SOARES DUE TO NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF FILED A DECLARATION FOR ADDITIONAL DEFENDANTS TO HER CLAIM.
